pages.text: PreFabs operate in one of four states:

pages.title: BUILDING State
pages.text: $(bold)Purpose$(): Initial setup and configuration$(br2)$(bold)Characteristics$(): $(li)PreFab is idle $(li)Player configures faces via GUI $(li)Player builds factory inside PreFab $(li)Places Importers/Exporters inside CM $(li)Connects chests to PreFab faces in Overworld $(li)CM chunks may be loaded or unloaded$(br2)$(bold)Transitions$(): $(li)Right-click with Simulation Wrench → $(bold)SIMULATING$()

pages.title: SIMULATING State
pages.text: $(bold)Purpose$(): Measure actual production rates$(br2)$(bold)Characteristics$(): $(li)CM chunks are $(bold)FORCE LOADED$() (factory actually runs) $(li)PreFab counts resources transported per tick $(li)Tracks each resource type separately $(li)Calculates: Rate = Total_Transported / Time_Elapsed $(li)Example: 128 iron ingots in 600 ticks = 0.213 iron/tick$(br2)$(bold)Transitions$(): $(li)Right-click with Simulation Wrench → $(bold)CACHED$() (calculates rates, unloads chunks)

pages.title: CACHED State
pages.text: $(bold)Purpose$(): Run factory virtually without chunk loading$(br2)$(bold)Characteristics$(): $(li)CM chunks are $(bold)UNLOADED$() ← $(bold)This is the performance gain.$() $(li)PreFab simulates production using fractional math $(li)Accumulates fractional rates: `accumulator += rate` $(li)When `accumulator >= 1.0`: Transport whole units $(li)Example: Rate 0.213 iron/tick → Every ~4.7 ticks, push 1 iron ingot$(br2)$(bold)This is the primary goal of the mod.$()$(br2)$(bold)Transitions$(): $(li)Input starved (can't pull from Overworld) → $(bold)HALTED$() $(li)Output blocked (can't push to Overworld) → $(bold)HALTED$() $(li)Right-click with Simulation Wrench → $(bold)SIMULATING$() (recalibrate)

pages.title: HALTED State
pages.text: $(bold)Purpose$(): Cache broke, needs player intervention$(br2)$(bold)Characteristics$(): $(li)CM chunks STAY $(bold)UNLOADED$() (do not reload) $(li)Production pauses $(li)Preserves cached rates (does not forget measurements) $(li)Waiting for player to fix Overworld side$(br2)$(bold)Common Causes$(): $(li)Input chest is empty (can't pull more items) $(li)Output chest is full (can't push more items) $(li)Importer/Exporter was broken$(br2)$(bold)Transitions$(): $(li)Right-click with Simulation Wrench → $(bold)SIMULATING$() (resumes, remeasures rates)
